basic_details.job_title: BMC Registration Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) Registration Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website BMC Official Website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the BMC Registration Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years

qualification.education_qualification: SSC pass from recognized board, Graduate from recognized university in Commerce, Science, Arts, Law or equivalent
qualification.details: SSC pass from recognized board. Graduate from recognized university in Commerce, Science, Arts, Law or equivalent. Good knowledge of computer operating system, word processing, spreadsheet, presentation, database software, email and internet.

selection_process: Merit based on educational qualification Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMC Registration Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://portal.mcgm.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BMC Registration Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BMC Registration Assistant post is 22nd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Registration Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSC from a recognized board and be a graduate from a recognized university in Commerce, Science, Arts, Law, or an equivalent field. Good computer knowledge is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 38 years for the Registration Assistant position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Registration Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BMC Registration Assistant position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Registration Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Registration Assistant post in the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the BMC Registration Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 790 + 18% GST for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit determined by educational qualifications, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the contract period for the Registration Assistant post?
faq.answer: The contract period for this position is from 01 October 2025 to 31 March 2027.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation, which is https://portal.mcgm.gov.in.
